heading: Documents to be delivered to the Executive Mansion
label: 1713 Documents to be delivered to the Executive Mansion
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office shall deliver to the Executive Mansion two copies of each document, bill, and resolution as soon as printed and ready for distribution.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 80 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 8828 Stat. 622
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235
